overall.description: Aerial drone footage from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the Arasaka Tower in Night City during a hazy sunset. The camera slowly orbits the massive corporate skyscraper as atmospheric fog rolls through the futuristic cityscape and neon signs illuminate against the orange sky.

events.description: atmospheric fog and smoke begin rolling in around the base of the Arasaka Tower

agents.ego_description: drone camera slowly panning left while maintaining focus on the Arasaka Tower

entered.detail: massive black skyscraper with glowing circular Arasaka logo near the top
tall building with illuminated Kang Tao corporate signage
bright white neon sign with Asian characters and Kang Tao text
sprawling futuristic cityscape with multiple high-rise buildings fading into the haze
orange and purple gradient sky with scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a clear aerial view of the Arasaka Tower dominating the center frame, with the Kang Tao building visible to the right. The camera slowly pans left as the sun sets, casting warm orange light across the futuristic cityscape. Around the 15-second mark, atmospheric fog begins to roll in around the tower base, gradually obscuring the lower portions of the buildings.

events.description: ambient light dims further as sun sets, causing neon signs and building lights to become more prominent
camera angle shifts slightly upward revealing the tower rooftop with small structural details and antennas

agents.ego_description: drone camera continuing slow orbit around the tower while rising to reveal rooftop structures

entered.detail: small silhouetted structures and antennas visible on the very top of the Arasaka Tower
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings with blue and orange neon lighting
thick layer of smog and clouds surrounding the mid-section of the tower and filling the valleys between buildings

segments.scene_description: As the drone continues its slow orbit, heavy atmospheric fog envelops the city while the camera rises to reveal the rooftop of the Arasaka Tower. The Kang Tao building moves out of frame behind the tower, replaced by new skyscrapers on the left. The lighting shifts to a darker twilight ambiance, emphasizing the artificial neon glow from the surrounding buildings against the deepening orange and purple sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial orbit around the Arasaka Tower as a clear sunset cityscape gradually dissolves into a fog-shrouded twilight. It begins with a wide view of the tower and the neighboring Kang Tao building, bathed in the warm orange light of a setting sun. As the camera slowly pans left, atmospheric fog begins to roll in around the base of the tower, steadily obscuring the lower levels of the futuristic city. The drone then rises to reveal the rooftop of the Arasaka Tower while the Kang Tao building slips out of frame, replaced by a new cluster of skyscrapers on the left. Finally, the lighting shifts to a darker twilight ambiance, where the deepening purple and orange sky emphasizes the artificial neon glow of the surrounding metropolis.
